nodes.label: Sanad Dashboard Screenshot
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad daily operations dashboard for Saudi legal and SME professionals. Shows a full-featured legal ops interface with sidebar navigation, KPI cards, priority tasks, compliance expiry tracker, and a daily regulatory brief panel. PWA-enabled, home-server optimized.

nodes.label: Dashboard View (Concept)
nodes.description: The main landing view of the Sanad app. Aggregates overdue tasks, expiring compliance items, urgent cases, active case count, open task count, billable hours, and focus time into a single operational overview. Includes a priorities list and a regulatory news brief.

nodes.label: Sanad Navigation Sidebar
nodes.description: Left-side navigation listing: Dashboard (active), Compliance (badge: 4), Case Board, Deep Work, Tasks (badge: 9), Documents. Badges on Compliance and Tasks indicate pending item counts.

nodes.label: Compliance Expiry Tracker
nodes.description: Dashboard section showing compliance items expiring soon with days remaining. Items shown: Sanad Legal LLC GOSI Filing (7d), Gulf Tech SME Commercial Registration (8d), Mohammed Saeed Iqama Renewal (18d), Sanad Legal LLC VAT Return Q2 (28d). Each item has a progress bar and category badge (GOSI, Commercial Reg., Iqama, Tax).

nodes.label: Daily Brief Panel
nodes.description: Right-side panel on the dashboard displaying curated regulatory news from MoJ (Ministry of Justice), MHRSD, and ZATCA. Shows tagged news items with dates and summaries. Featured items: MoJ E-Litigation Portal v3 launch, MHRSD Remote Work Policy update.

nodes.label: Today's Priorities Panel
nodes.description: Dashboard section listing today's priority tasks with priority label, overdue indicator, and auto-scheduling tag. Sample: 'Follow up on NDA signature' for TechCo, tagged High, 1d overdue, auto.

sample_task.title: Follow up on NDA signature
sample_task.detail: TechCo NDA sent 5 days ago — chase signature

nodes.label: Billable Time Tracker
nodes.description: Dashboard KPI card showing billable time today (1h 30m) and corresponding SAR value (1,275 SAR). Enables quick revenue visibility from the main dashboard.

nodes.label: Focus Timer KPI
nodes.description: Dashboard KPI card for focus time today (45m 00s). Tied to the 'Start focus' action button. Tracks deep-work/focus sessions for the day.

nodes.label: PWA Capabilities
nodes.description: Sanad is PWA-enabled for desktop install. Timer and UI state are cached locally for minimal server load. Footer confirms 'Home-server optimized · PWA enabled'.

nodes.label: DashboardView.tsx
nodes.description: React component implementing the main dashboard view visible in the screenshot.

nodes.label: CasesView.tsx
nodes.description: React component for the Case Board navigation item seen in the sidebar.

nodes.label: DeepWorkView.tsx
nodes.description: React component for the Deep Work section seen in the sidebar.

nodes.label: DocumentsView.tsx
nodes.description: React component for the Documents section seen in the sidebar.

nodes.label: InvoicesView.tsx
nodes.description: React component likely implementing billable time and SAR invoicing logic visible in dashboard KPI cards.
